samplePolicy.policyNature: project admission thresholds; revise only through R004 ADR after evidence review

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: N004/F003 available with synthetic studentCount=2 and minKnowledgeSampleSize=2; REAL012 real-question analysis smoke is ready without production history writes.
admissionMatrix.allowedOutput: 得分率、区分度、薄弱知识点和讲评建议；必须标注 draft/test 或非正式口径。
admissionMatrix.teacherExplanationDuty: 解释为描述性班级讲评信号，不解释为能力量尺、成长分或跨卷可比分。
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 只要使用真实学生数据、写正式历史口径、隐藏小样本提示或绕过 N001/P001 授权，即阻断。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: current F003 sample is synthetic studentCount=2; no reviewed large response sample, fit/DIF diagnostics, or psychometric owner evidence.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得新增 IRT endpoint、UI 文案、导出字段或数据库正式指标；AI 只能生成待审解释草稿。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no anchor-item design, cross-form common-student/common-item evidence, or operational equating owner.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得宣称不同试卷分数可直接等值；只能保留单卷内描述性分析。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no authorized longitudinal identifiers, cohort continuity evidence, or privacy retention approval.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得生成学生长期成长轨迹、排名趋势或正式历史学情；只允许当前班级 draft/test 汇总。

blockers: R004 remains todo; ADR-006 exists, but no post-ADR feature admission for advanced methods exists yet.
Current F003 sample is synthetic and small (studentCount=2, minKnowledgeSampleSize=2).
REAL012 only proves sampled real-question commentary reference; full 2015-2025 closure is still not_closed.
No real authorized student score sample, psychometric owner, anchor design, or explanation responsibility card exists.
nextRequiredEvidence: post-ADR feature admission with explicit owner, rollback, sample plan, and teacher explanation card
authorized/anonymized multi-class score sample after P001/P006 boundary is clear
CTT baseline benchmark showing why current descriptive reports are insufficient
independent review of IRT/equating/growth interpretation risk before any production UI
boundary: R004 only refreshes advanced-analysis admission evidence and ADR-006; it performs no production write, no real student data processing, no IRT/equating computation, and no completion-state transition.
rollback: revert tools/run-r004-advanced-analysis-eval-preflight-contract.ps1, docs/templates/r004-advanced-analysis-eval-checklist.md, docs/decisions/ADR-006-advanced-analysis-admission.md, tasks/backlog.csv, and remove the generated R004 admission report.
